title: Method - Sens*Hac
description: Our strategic interior design method, from brand diagnosis through opening.

blocks.title:
OUR METHOD:
FROM STRATEGY TO
OPENING.

items.title: Brand diagnosis and strategy
items.summary: We analyse your business, audience and commercial goals before design begins.

details.label: Business audit
details.text: We identify commercial challenges and growth goals.

details.label: Spatial feasibility
details.text: We assess whether the location supports your business model.

items.title: Creative concept
items.summary: We translate strategy into a memorable spatial experience.

details.label: Identity
details.text: We apply your branding and values to the interior architecture.

details.label: Flow design
details.text: We plan operations, the sales journey and key zones.

details.label: Bespoke design and FF&E
details.text: We define furniture, lighting and materials.

items.title: Technical development
items.summary: We turn the creative vision into a viable, safe and buildable project.

details.label: Technical drawings
details.text: Detailed documentation for contractors and trades.

details.label: Budget development
details.text: A clear economic breakdown of the project.

details.label: Adapted technical design
details.text: Alignment with the location’s technical and regulatory needs.

items.title: Site supervision and installation coordination
items.summary: We guide execution so the built result remains faithful to the design.

details.label: One point of contact
details.text: We centralise communication across the project.

details.label: Site supervision
details.text: Periodic visits to review technical details and finishes.

details.label: Final quality control
details.text: We verify quality and visual fidelity.

blocks.intro: Choose the level of support you need by commissioning the process in phases:

items.title: Strategic consultation
items.text: An intensive session to audit the location and define brand, layout and sales flow priorities.

items.title: Creative concept
items.text: Phases I and II, including strategy, spatial layout and 3D visualisation.

items.title: Full project
items.text: The complete process, from initial strategy through execution.
